name: Hashbrown Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups shredded American or cheddar cheese
1 Can cream of chicken soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9x13 baking dish.
2. In a large bowl, mix the cheese, soup, sour cream, onion, green pepper, melted butter, salt, and pepper.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Fold in the thawed frozen hash-brown potatoes.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
6. Sprinkle the crushed cornflakes and 1 tablespoon of butter evenly on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
